SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"

STATUS_FILE="/tmp/wrapper_pnr_status.txt"
LR_PID=214817

# Write initial status
echo "$(date): Start monitoring LR PID=$LR_PID" > "$STATUS_FILE"

# Background loop
(
for i in $(seq 1 240); do
  sleep 60
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i LR=${LR:-DONE} step=$STEP lines=$LINES $YTAIL" >> "$STATUS_FILE"
  if [ -z "$LR" ]; then
    echo "LIBRELANE_COMPLETE" >> "$STATUS_FILE"
    break
  fi
done
) &

MONITOR_PID=$!
echo "Background monitor PID: $MONITOR_PID"
echo "Status file: $STATUS_FILE"

# Now wait in foreground for librelane to complete - check every 30 min
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  sleep 1800
  echo "=== Check $i at $(date) ==="
  # Show last 5 lines of status
  tail -5 "$STATUS_FILE"
  echo "---"
  # Check if librelane finished
  if ! kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "LibreLane DONE!"
    break
  fi
  # Show current step  
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  echo "Current step: $STEP"
done
